title: Further education outcomes: 2022 to 2023
body: "Outcome measures covering learners’:   destinations, into employment and learning progression   The measures also include estimates of the earnings outcomes of:   learners who achieved an apprenticeship adult learners who achieved a skills course at full level 2, full level 3, level 4 or higher   The data uses the longitudinal education outcomes study. This looks at how learners move through education and into the labour market by bringing together:   schools, further and higher education information from the Department for Education employment information from HM Revenue and Customs benefit histories from the Department for Work and Pensions   If you have any questions about this publication email: FE.OutcomesData@education.gov.uk. "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
